titleStmt.title: SII 31.135: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 135. (A.R. No. B 241 of 1936.) VANIKUNṬA VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying near the tank about 15 k.m., to the west of the village.
It is dated Śaka 1619, Bahudhānya, Āsvīja, Śu. 10. The Cyclic year Bahudhānya corresponds to the Śaka 1620 and the date of the record may be corresponded to October 4, Tuesday, 1698 A.D.

It records the gift of the village Vaniguṁṭa situated in the Vinikoṇḍasīma with let and hindrance by Veṁkaṭappanāyaka, the son of Rāyapanāyaka and the grandson of Veligōṭi Pedakoṁḍamanāyaka of Rēcharla gōtra to Aṁ[ṇa]amgarāchārya, son of Śrī Raṁggachāryya and the grandson of Kaṁḍāḷa Bhāvanāchārya. The donor is stated to have received the Vinikoṇḍa sīma as nāyaṁkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu
1619 Agunēṭi bahudhānya saṁ
vatsara Āsvī(śvī)ja śū0lu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīraṁgga
rāyadēpamahārāyalugāru penuṁ
goṁḍa nagaramuna vajrasiṁhāsanā
rūḍhulai pṛidhivīsāmrājyamu śēyu
cuṁḍaṁgānu vādhūlagōtraṁ Āpa
sdha(sta)ṁbasūtraṁ yajaśśākhādhyāyu
śrīmadvēdamārga pratiṣṭā
ryulaina pubhayavēdāṁttācārya ka
ṁdāḷa bhāvanācāryu Ayyavāri pautṛ
laina śrīraṁggacāryula Ayagāri putṛlai
na Aṁṇaṁgarācāryula Ayyavāriki rē
carla vaṁśōdbhavulaina veligōṭipedakoṁḍama nāya
niṁgāri pautṛlaina rāyapaṁnāyani gāripu
tṛlaina veṁkaṭappanāyaniṁgāru daṁḍḍaṁ samarpiṁcci
yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ kramameṭlanna rāyalavārunu
ku Amaranāyaṁkkaranaku pāliṁccina vinikoṁḍḍasīmalō
ni vaniguṁṭṭa sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārā pūrvakaṁgā
dhāravōsi sti mi vāri putra pautra
pāraṁparyaṁ Ācaṁdrākasdhāyigānu sarvamā
gānu Anūbhavaṁcēdi . sva
dattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ
paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ nippalaṁ bhavēt .
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
